items.h: AEW Dynamite rating: How did the final episode before Forbidden Door perform?
items.p: By Jason Powell, ProWrestling.net Editor... The post AEW Dynamite rating: How did the final episode before Forbidden Door perform? appeared first on Pro Wrestling Dot Net.
The final episode of "AEW Dynamite" before Forbidden Door was full of action, but it did take a hit in the TV ratings on a very competitive night.

items.h: AEW Dynamite ratings down against World Cup coverage
items.p: Wednesday night’s episode of AEW Dynamite averaged 616,000 viewers on TBS, down 7.4% from the previous week. It’s the second lowest audience for the show since May 20th. Dynamite averaged a 0.10...
